recommendations.title: The Trixxer
recommendations.overview: A mysterious serial killer is shocking the underworld. Scotland Yard is investigating the case. Clues lead the detectives to Blackwhite Castle.

recommendations.title: The House That Dripped Blood
recommendations.overview: A Scotland Yard investigator looks into four mysterious cases involving an unoccupied house.

recommendations.title: Brannigan
recommendations.overview: A hard-nosed Chicago cop is sent to London to bring back an American mobster being held for extradition. Brannigan in his Irish-American way brings American law to the people of Scotland Yard but has to contend with a stuffy old London first.

recommendations.title: The 39 Steps
recommendations.overview: Richard Hanney has a rude awakening when a glamorous female spy falls into his bed - with a knife in her back. Having a bit of trouble explaining it all to Scotland Yard, he heads for the hills of Scotland to try to clear his name by locating the spy

recommendations.title: Delhi Belly
recommendations.overview: Three unsuspecting, average guys find themselves on the hit list of one of India's most-powerful crime syndicates.

recommendations.title: The Woman in Green
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes investigates when young women around London turn up murdered, each with a finger severed. Scotland Yard suspects a madman, but Holmes believes the killings to be part of a diabolical plot.

recommendations.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
recommendations.overview: The Bride unwaveringly continues on her roaring rampage of revenge against the band of assassins who had tried to kill her and her unborn child. She visits each of her former associates one-by-one, checking off the victims on her Death List Five unti

recommendations.title: Blackmail
recommendations.overview: London, 1929. Frank Webber, a very busy Scotland Yard detective, seems to be more interested in his work than in Alice White, his girlfriend. Feeling herself ignored, Alice agrees to go out with an elegant and well-mannered artist who invites her to

recommendations.title: T2 Trainspotting
recommendations.overview: After 20 years abroad, Mark Renton returns to Scotland and reunites with his old friends Sick Boy, Spud and Begbie.

recommendations.title: The Boston Strangler
